---
title: 'Untitled Post'
date: '2017-12-11T03:58:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell''s Idea Central (Random Idea Catalogue)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5309069668107230487'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/excellence-demands-openness-and-honesty.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell_s Idea Central (Random Idea Catalogue)/feed.atom'
---

Excellence demands openness and honesty. No Secrets and No Hiding. Anything less than perfect transperancy leaves room for failure, lies, theft, or something nefarious.  DarrellWolfe.com
